ogTitle: Glen Aplin vs Glen Cairn: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Aplin and Glen Cairn.
heading: Glen Aplin vs Glen Cairn — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Aplin, Queensland and Glen Cairn, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Cairn has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Glen Aplin (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Aplin or Glen Cairn safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Aplin has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Glen Cairn scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Aplin scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Cairn scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Aplin or Glen Cairn?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Cairn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
